session.assistant: Now add to the optional_fields in the PlanHeaderSchema.validate() and add validation. I need to read that section:
session.tool_result:
465→ 466→@dataclass(frozen=True) 467→class PlanHeaderSchema(MetadataBlockSchema): 468→ """Schema for plan-header blocks. 469→ 470→ Fields: 471→ schema_version: Internal version identifier ("2") 472→ created_at: ISO 8601 timestamp of plan creation 473→ created_by: GitHub username of plan creator 474→ worktree_name: Set when worktree is created (nullable) 475→ branch_name: Git branch name for this plan (nullable) 476→ plan_comment_id: GitHub comment ID containing the plan content (nullable) 477→ ci_summary_comment_id: GitHub comment ID containing CI failure summaries (nullable) 478→ last_dispatched_run_id: Updated by workflow, enables direct run lookup (nullable) 479→ last_dispatched_at: Updated by workflow (nullable) 480→ last_local_impl_at: Updated by local implementation, tracks last event timestamp (nullable) 481→ last_local_impl_event: Event type - "started" or "ended" (nullable) 482→ last_local_impl_session: Claude Code session ID from environment (nullable) 483→ last_local_impl_user: User who ran the implementation (nullable) 484→ last_remote_impl_at: Updated by GitHub Actions, tracks last remote run (nullable) 485→ last_remote_impl_run_id: GitHub Actions run ID for remote implementation (nullable) 486→ last_remote_impl_session_id: Claude Code session ID for remote implementation (nullable) 487→ source_repo: For cross-repo plans, the repo where implementation happens (nullable) 488→ objective_issue: Parent objective issue number (nullable) 489→ created_from_session: Session ID that created this plan (nullable) 490→ created_from_workflow_run_url: Workflow run URL that created this plan (nullable) 491→ last_learn_session: Session ID that last invoked learn (nullable) 492→ last_learn_at: ISO 8601 timestamp of last learn invocation (nullable) 493→ learn_status: Learning workflow status (nullable) 494→ learn_plan_issue: Issue number of generated learn plan (nullable)
... [50 lines omitted] ...

**Phase 2: Plan header functions**

session.tool_result:
1→"""Schema v2 plan header operations for erk-plan issues. 2→ 3→These support the new plan issue structure where: 4→- Issue body contains only compact metadata (for fast querying) 5→- First comment contains the plan content 6→- last_dispatched_run_id is stored in issue body 7→ 8→Optional fields (added over time, backward compatible): 9→- source_repo: For cross-repo plans, the repo where this plan will be 10→ implemented (e.g., "owner/impl-repo"). When set, the plan issue lives in 11→ a different repo (the plans repo) than where code changes will be made. 12→""" 13→ 14→import re 15→from typing import Any 16→ 17→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import ( 18→ create_metadata_block, 19→ create_plan_body_block, 20→ find_metadata_block, 21→ render_metadata_block, 22→ render_plan_body_block, 23→ replace_metadata_block_in_body, 24→) 25→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import ( 26→ BRANCH_NAME, 27→ CI_SUMMARY_COMMENT_ID, 28→ CREATED_AT, 29→ CREATED_BY, 30→ CREATED_FROM_SESSION,
